body.title: Builders REPORT a result artifact; Granny reconciles — remove all builder-side ticket writes
body.description:
**From D-granny-sole-ticket-writer-2026-07-07. Root fix for the handshake-race drain-killer; makes Granny the strict sole writer of ticket data.**

**Change:** the builder devices (AiderDevice, DickSimnelDevice) STOP writing ticket state. Remove _escalate_ticket's cc_queue setstatus/append-note, and the _builder_close mixin's cc_queue close. Instead the builder sends Granny a RESULT ENVELOPE (interim artifact) via the bus: {ticket_id, outcome: done|escalated, branch, changed_files, verdict/gate_result, missing_lever_or_reason, notes}. Granny's reply-processing RECONCILES it into the canonical ticket: outcome=done -> close shipped-unproven naming the builder's lever (the _builder_close honesty logic moves here); outcome=escalated -> set escalated with the reason + append the note. dispatch_done carries the markup (no longer observability-only).

**Affected files:** unseen_university/devices/aider/device.py (_escalate_ticket, _post_result), unseen_university/devices/aider/worker_listener.py (emit result envelope), unseen_university/devices/dicksimnel/device.py, unseen_university/devices/_builder_close.py (logic migrates to Granny; file may retire), unseen_university/devices/granny/daemon.py (_process_handshake_replies -> reconcile result envelopes + own the close).

**Verify (D's falsifiable slice):** (1) grep/audit: builders make ZERO cc_queue mutation calls; (2) the handshake-race regression test (tests/granny/test_handshake_no_regress.py) still passes with the no-regress guard REMOVED (proving single-writer makes it impossible, not merely guarded); (3) live: aider escalates an unbuildable ticket and the drain does NOT stick.

**Scope boundary:** move ticket-state authorship from builders to Granny. NOT emit_merge_proof (keep). NOT the pipeline-stations decomposition (separate, D-dev-pipeline-stations).
**Design rules:** single-writer ownership; builder has no cc_queue dependency after this; honest shipped-unproven close logic preserved (moved to Granny); log every state change at the owner.
**Rollback:** git revert; the no-regress guard remains as the safety net during migration.
**intention:** I intend that only Granny writes ticket state and builders only report, so overwrite races and builder-side store bugs cannot occur.

## Pre-computed constraints (auto-stamped at add time)
[hard_block] ⛔ NO SQLITE. EVER. POSTGRES OR FLAT-FILE ONLY. See banner at top of this file. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[hard_block] Log every state change and every interface crossing. State changes: ticket status — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] No TheIgors imports. UnseenUniversity must be portable without TheIgors present. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] No live keys or passwords in source. `.env` is gitignored. — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] `pip install -e .` must succeed at all times (even with empty stubs). — applies: all (source: CLAUDE.md#hard-rules)
[error] Canonical dev-process memory — one home, no exceptions. Every dev-process artifact — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] device.py and shim.py are the design center. Every component inherits from — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] bus/ owns comms:// routing. Nothing outside bus/ speaks to IMAP directly. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] skeleton/ owns the MCP aggregator and flat-file registry. No Postgres dependency. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] devices/ contains one subdirectory per device; each is independently deployable. — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] `~/.unseen_university/logs/<device>/<stream>/` is the canonical log hierarchy — — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
[error] Every ticket closes proven, or declares itself unproven — no discriminator. A ticket that — applies: tags: architecture (source: CLAUDE.md#structural-rules)
…and 39 more (lower-severity or capped) — query constraints_get for the full set
body.result: Single-writer contract SHIPPED + proven live. Builders (aider) make ZERO ticket writes: _post_result->_build_report and _escalate_ticket->_escalation_artifact return interim artifacts {outcome,branch,note,missing_lever|reason}; worker_listener rides them on dispatch_done; Granny._reconcile_builder_result is the SOLE writer (close shipped-unproven w/ lever via cc_queue, or escalate; idempotent no-op once terminal). Dropped BuilderCloseMixin from AiderDevice. 46 unit tests green. LIVE PROOF: reset an escalated ticket -> aider built+reported escalated with ZERO cc_queue mutations -> Granny reconciled_escalated -> _worker_busy cleared, NO stick. The drain-killer race is gone by construction + the builder's cc_queue MUTATION dependency is eliminated.
body.unproven_reason: refactor has no red->green form (proof is the 46 unit tests + the live no-mutation/no-stick run); fast-follows: read-side (dispatch carries ticket copy so builder needn't fetch), DickSimnel same refactor, guard-removal validation
